unfold.summary: Learn and Triage were dogfooded during real Portless work. The expanded public corpus includes unvalidated backfills and does not raise maturity; the consolidated protocol has not beaten a baseline yet.

pick-an-issue.summary: Used to select real and synthetic maintenance candidates. The v0.0.1 matrix and explicit human-selection boundary have not been benchmarked yet.

record-a-case.summary: Derived from public maintenance backfills and structured as an evidence ledger. It has candidate evals but has not completed a baseline comparison or human review round.
